svg.title: vCenter deployment journey: overview, prerequisites, Stage 1, Stage 2, SSO, RBAC, inventory and backup, vCenter HA
svg.desc: Eight numbered stations show the order of stand-up steps for vCenter Server. A central vCenter appliance icon sits at the top; the eight stations form the journey to bring it up healthy.
svg.text: One appliance · eight phases of stand-up · in this order

g.text: Each numbered station is a separate subtopic with its own concept, before/after, analogy, quick check, ELI5/ELI10, real-world, flashcards, quiz. End state: a healthy management plane ready for lesson 10 (networking).
